comment: Amazing prof! Would heavily recommend!
Great professor, took him last fall and he was absolutely amazing. He gave amazing advice on the industry process. Assignments were straightforward but also very informative.
He was super friendly and fun to listen Would take his class again
Inspirational !!! I guess it was ALRIGHT
Professor McConaughey is one of the best professors I've met. Really cool insights about the industry, other actors, and his lectures are inspiring.
way to many "assignments"
It was pretty awesome learning from the Matthew McConaughey
Would Take Again: Yes

DO TAKE HIM, I personally only took him bc I mean he is THE MATTHEW MCCONAUGHEY, but I loved his lectures and the antidotes he shared, its good to hear and learn from someone who is actually in the industry.

The greatest professor of all time. 100% recommend this class, but only if you get Matthew. I would recommend watching a few of his movies before class and use his most famous quotes in daily conversations with him.
I honestly love him, sometimes it was a little tired to listen to his lectures but i learned a lot and it help me to be better. He is a good teacher

I'm not sure why some people take his class... Professor McConaughey hands down knows what he's talking about, been in there film bones for a while, he's a great person to learn from... One of the best. Wise.

This professor takes pride in making an impact through his lectures. He will say random things and crazy anecdotes but they keep you engaged and listening. If you stay on top of the lecture notes you will be fine. His tests almost directly reflect the reviews, so if you do those every test (which isn't hard), you'll have an easy A. Great professor

Best professor I have ever had!!!! I don't think I could've gone through this semester without his inspirational lectures that really made me reconsider my views on life. I couldn't have done it better myself.
He shows movies of himself, talks about other actors, and overall great professor.

It was cool to take him bc hes famous, but he didnt really teach. he just gave out a lot of busy work and over-lectured on the most unimportant things. his anecdotes were cool as they were also plentiful. there were a couple of hard group projects & didnt give much feedback. kinda wish i took another prof but oh well
SKIP CLASS? YOU WON'T PASS.
Amazing Teacher, Had a blast taking his class!
amazing professor but I feel like hed be great at acting
Best class ever! He really know his stuff! You gotta work for it but great class.
His class was ALRIGHT, ALRIGHT, ALRIGHT!
